description_long: This object consists of three identical bar stools arranged in a row, each featuring a round, black cushioned seat supported by a slender, tubular metal frame. The frame is composed of a single central support that extends downward and curves into a circular base, providing stability. Each stool is equipped with a semi-circular footrest attached to the main support, positioned at a comfortable height for resting feet. The design is sleek and modern, with a minimalist aesthetic and no visible decorative embellishments. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the frame and synthetic leather or vinyl for the seat. The overall look is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban public spaces such as cafes, bars, or waiting areas.
description: A set of three modern bar stools with round black seats and minimalist tubular metal frames, each featuring a circular base and semi-circular footrest. The design is sleek, functional, and well-suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three stools side by side, highlighting the round seats, circular bases, and semi-circular footrests.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the profile of the stools, the curvature of the footrests, and the alignment of the seats.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the seats and the symmetry of the bases and footrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the side profile and the arrangement of the footrests and bases.
